summary: Successfully completed comprehensive testing of the new Advanced panel implementation for LLM Council. All backend APIs and frontend UI components are working correctly. The Advanced panel allows users to configure LLM source (OpenRouter, LM Studio, Hybrid) with proper settings persistence and backend integration.
passed_tests: Advanced panel opens when clicking on the advanced button (nav-advanced)
Mode selection works correctly: OpenRouter, LM Studio, Hybrid modes all functional
Badge in header updates when mode changes and displays correct mode
OpenRouter settings section shows when mode is openrouter or hybrid
LM Studio settings section shows when mode is lmstudio or hybrid
Hybrid model assignments appear correctly with 4 council models and chairman assignment
Test Connection button works and calls backend API /api/lm-studio/test
Settings are persisted in localStorage with key 'llm_council_advanced_settings'
Panel closes when clicking Close button
Panel reopens when clicking mode badge in header
Backend streaming endpoint /api/conversations/{id}/message/stream accepts advanced parameter
All mode transitions work correctly with proper section visibility
Council model assignments in hybrid mode work with toggle buttons
Chairman source assignment in hybrid mode works correctly
localStorage persistence maintains hybrid configuration with councilModelSources
success_percentage: Backend: 100% (advanced config streaming endpoint working), Frontend: 100% (all Advanced panel features functional)
